description: Open the Case Fact Summary with case number and filing date in bold on the first content line
example_before:
## Case Fact Summary

### Parties

Plaintiff Hartwell...
example_after:
## Case Fact Summary

**Case No.:** 2024-CV-04821 | **Filed:** March 15, 2024

### Parties

description: Use passive voice in the Claims & Allegations section when describing what the defendant allegedly did
example_after: Thornton allegedly made material misrepresentations regarding investor commitments.

description: Include the jurisdiction immediately after the court identification in the header section
example_after: **Court:** U.S. District Court, Southern District of New York

description: Cite statutes with full code reference (Title U.S.C. § Section) rather than short form
In the Relief Sought section, use bullet-list format rather than paragraph prose
example_before: Plaintiff seeks compensatory damages of $20M, punitive damages, disgorgement of $750K, and attorneys fees.
example_after:
- Compensatory damages of no less than $20,000,000
- Punitive damages (amount TBD at trial)
- Disgorgement of $750,000
- Attorneys' fees and costs
